inputs.label: Titrant Concentration
inputs.businessContext: Concentration of the standard solution used for titration.

inputs.label: Volume of Titrant
inputs.businessContext: Volume of titrant added to reach the endpoint.

inputs.label: Volume of Analyte
inputs.businessContext: Volume of the sample solution being titrated.

inputs.label: Stoichiometric Coefficient (Titrant)

businessContext_i18n.tr: Dengeli reaksiyon denkleminde titrantın mol oranı.
